mnemonics: TCPSocks Are Just Flags Over Relay Stations
TCP Connection Is Just For You
keyPoints: Establishing a connection using TCP/IP sockets involves creating a socket, binding it to a port, and connecting to a remote host.
When a client sends data to a server, the server sends an acknowledgement packet to confirm receipt, followed by the data packet.
The three-way handshake involves SYN, SYN-ACK, and ACK packets to establish a connection and ensure reliable data transfer.
